description_long: This is a classic wooden barrel with a cylindrical shape, reinforced by three prominent black metal hoops encircling its body. The wood staves are dark brown and show a subtle grain texture, giving the barrel an aged, rustic appearance. Faded white lettering wraps around the side, with the word 'Captain Morgan' partially visible, suggesting it once contained rum or a similar beverage. The top of the barrel is flat and also features a faint decorative emblem or logo. A small wooden spigot is present on the side, indicating the barrel was designed to dispense liquid. The overall construction appears robust, suitable for storage or decorative use in an urban or commercial setting.
description: A dark wooden barrel with black metal hoops, faded 'Captain Morgan' branding, and a side spigot, showing signs of age and use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the faded 'ain Mo' text, black metal hoops, and a small spigot on the left side.
description_view_1: Side view with the 'Morgan' text most visible, and the spigot just barely visible on the left edge.
description_view_2: Rear view with partial 'an Ca' text, no spigot visible, and clear view of the wood grain and hoops.
description_view_3: Side view with 'Captain' text most visible, and the spigot just visible on the right edge.
attribute_labeling_or_markings: faded 'Captain Morgan' text and decorative emblem
